productStatement: GrantLayer turns agentic grant workflows into verifiable institutional records.

requiredConfiguration: Database file path or in-memory declaration
persistenceBackends.migrationExpectation: File-based migration executed on startup for non-memory databases
persistenceBackends.backupExpectation: No automated backup guidance; operator-dependent file copies
persistenceBackends.ciTestExpectation: Full test suite runs in-memory without external services
persistenceBackends.notes: SQLite is not sufficient alone for production-readiness claims. Must not become production default.

persistenceBackends.purpose: Primary production candidate backend for institutional workloads
persistenceBackends.migrationExpectation: Migrations must be validated against PostgreSQL before deployment
persistenceBackends.backupExpectation: Automated backup schedule, retention policy, and disaster recovery runbooks required before production claim
persistenceBackends.ciTestExpectation: CI must be able to run tests against a live PostgreSQL instance
persistenceBackends.notes: PostgreSQL is the planned production backend but is not yet implemented or verified.

backendBoundaryRules: Product Core should not depend on SQLite-specific behavior
Backend-specific connection details should stay behind configuration boundaries
Database credentials are secret-bearing config and must use approved secret sources
Storage backend choice should not change public API contracts
Persistence errors should map into stable error semantics
Production mode should fail closed if persistence config is missing or invalid
productionClaimRules: Production persistence claim requires explicit database backend declaration
Production persistence claim requires validated connection configuration
Production persistence claim requires credentials from approved secret source
Production persistence claim requires schema compatibility verified on target backend
Production persistence claim requires all migrations validated against target backend
Production persistence claim requires transaction consistency tests passing
Production persistence claim requires CI able to run PostgreSQL-backed tests
Production persistence claim requires backup/restore expectations defined and verified
Production persistence claim requires operational runbooks for persistence
Production persistence claim requires no SQLite-only default in production mode
Production persistence claim is not yet claimed
